Home / AI Coding Assistants / Tabby

Tabby — open source alternative

Self-hosted AI coding assistant you can run on your own GPU.

Strengths

  • Fully self-hosted code completion.
  • VS Code, IntelliJ, vim extensions.
  • Runs on consumer GPUs with quantized models.

Weaknesses

  • GPU strongly recommended for good latency.
  • Larger install footprint.
  • Enterprise features gated.
License: Apache-2.0 (community) / commercial (enterprise) Self-host difficulty: 3/5 Self-host only

Official site · Source on GitHub

Ad slot — OSS middle

Tabby is used as an alternative to

GitHub Copilot

AI pair programmer trained on public code.

See all alternatives →
